full_text:
Kong Gui (Shulin) 孔桂 (叔林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Gui (孔桂), styledShulin (叔林), was born in Hanyang. Skilled at chess and football, he was a favourite of Cao Cao and backed Cao Zhi. Kong Gui was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
